metadata.description: Real-time ambient occlusion - requires global scene knowledge

summary: Blender AO reads occluding geometry around surface. Real-time AO requires either baked AO maps or screen-space techniques.

parameters.Samples: Number of samples for AO calculation

blender_behavior: Raytraces scene geometry to find occlusion
unity_alternatives: Baked AO texture map - pre-calculated offline
HDRP Ambient Occlusion - built-in renderer feature
shader_graph_limitation: ShaderGraph cannot access scene geometry at runtime
workaround: Use baked AO map instead - texture the occlusion offline
compatibility_loss_90_percent: Fundamentally incompatible - scene information not available in ShaderGraph
